dashboard.uploadFirst: Upload your first meal to see AI analysis results here.
dashboard.healthyRecipeDesc: Upload a photo of your fridge & get healthy recipes instantly.

addMeal.title: Add a Meal
addMeal.subtitle: Upload a photo and describe your meal for AI analysis
addMeal.dragDrop: Drag & drop an image here, or click to browse
addMeal.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g., Pancakes with maple syrup and fresh berries
addMeal.disclaimer: Sugar estimates are approximate and should not be used for medical decisions. Consult a healthcare professional for dietary advice.

statistics.subtitle: Track your daily sugar consumption

features.trackProgressDesc: Monitor your journey towards a sugar-free life.
features.secureDesc: Your data is safe and protected.

timer.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset your sugar-free timer? This action cannot be undone.

fridge.title: Scan Your Fridge
fridge.subtitle: Upload a photo of your fridge and get 3 healthy recipe suggestions
fridge.dragDrop: Drag & drop an image here, or click to browse
fridge.tip: Tip: Make sure your fridge contents are clearly visible for the best results. Open the door wide and take a well-lit photo!
fridge.recipesSubtitle: Healthy recipes based on your fridge ingredients
fridge.noRecipes: No recipes found. Try uploading a clearer photo.
fridge.noImageError: Please select a fridge photo first
